title: One Entity
text: One Entity A One Entity is a Modeled Entity that represents the one side in a one-to-many relationship. Characteristics Characteristics Object type code: ent Main Development Object? Yes Part of: — Contains: Field , Key , Relationship , Property , Code Container Generalization: Modeled Entity Specializations: Up Entity Compilation Output: — Specialization The One Entity specializes Modeled Entity in that it is referenced by a Relationship that is owned by a Many Entity.
